name: CRM
description: CRM, quotes (rules, conditions, revisions), activities, medical event plans and branded PDFs.

declared_permissions.label: CRM — view accounts, contacts, opportunities, and quotes
declared_permissions.description: Read-only access to CRM lists, quotes, and rule sets.

declared_permissions.label: CRM — create and edit
declared_permissions.description: Create, update, and delete CRM records, quotes, and quote rule sets.

accounting_integration_consumer.summary: When core invoice automation is enabled, CRM can create draft invoices in the connected accounting provider (e.g. accepted quotes).

changelog: Opportunity view: purple-style event guide breakdown, guide_questions in lead meta, approximate wage costs from Time & Billing cards (SPARROW_CRM_GUIDE_WAGE_CARD_ID); public calculator venue_type. Prior: calculator routes, lead_meta_json, Kanban, intake, quote prefill, CRM nav.
